label: Backstory category filter
description: A filter that controls which backstory categories are used or excluded when generating a pawn's backstory.

categories.label: Categories
categories.description: Backstory category tags matched against any backstory slot.

exclude.label: Exclude
exclude.description: Backstory category tags excluded from any backstory slot. Entries matching these tags are rejected.

categoriesChildhood.label: Categories (childhood)
categoriesChildhood.description: Backstory category tags matched against the childhood slot only.

excludeChildhood.label: Exclude (childhood)
excludeChildhood.description: Backstory category tags excluded from the childhood slot.

categoriesAdulthood.label: Categories (adulthood)
categoriesAdulthood.description: Backstory category tags matched against the adulthood slot only.

excludeAdulthood.label: Exclude (adulthood)
excludeAdulthood.description: Backstory category tags excluded from the adulthood slot.

commonality.label: Commonality
commonality.description: Relative weight of this filter in random selection. Higher values increase the chance of picking backstories from the matched categories.
